message:
refactor(demo): Clippy cleanup and idiomatic Rust patterns

wizard.rs:
- Remove unnecessary .clone() on notification_msg (moved into closure)
- Replace format!() with push_str() for error string concatenation
  (avoids allocating intermediate format string)

theme.rs:
- Use let-chains (if-let && condition) for COLORTERM detection
  (cleaner than nested if-let)
- Replace repeat().take() with repeat_n() (stabilized in Rust 1.82)
- Remove unnecessary .to_string() call on render() output
- Fix doc comments: escape backticks around TrueColor, NO_COLOR

No functional changes - all improvements suggested by Clippy lints.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
